title: AudioStream
description: Streaming long-form audio backed by an `HTMLAudioElement` — background tracks, voice-over, **and internet radio** (same mechanism, low CPU/RAM). Decoded lazily via the browser's media pipeline, so memory cost scales with the decode buffer rather than total duration. `AudioStream` is a **data descriptor**: it holds the media element and default playback parameters but does not play itself. Playback is driven by `AudioManager.play(stream, options)`, which returns an AudioStreamVoice for fine-grained control (pause/resume, seek, loop, rate, volume, spatial). Because an `HTMLAudioElement` has a single playhead, a stream has **one active voice at a time** — playing again stops the previous voice. Routes through the manager's `music` bus by default (override via PlayOptions.bus). Use Sound for short, frequently-triggered clips that benefit from pre-decoded `AudioBuffer` storage and pooled overlapping playback.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Streaming long-form audio backed by an `HTMLAudioElement` — background tracks, voice-over, **and internet radio** (same mechanism, low CPU/RAM). Decoded lazily via the browser's media pipeline, so memory cost scales with the decode buffer rather than total duration.

`AudioStream` is a **data descriptor**: it holds the media element and default playback parameters but does not play itself. Playback is driven by `AudioManager.play(stream, options)`, which returns an AudioStreamVoice for fine-grained control (pause/resume, seek, loop, rate, volume, spatial).

Because an `HTMLAudioElement` has a single playhead, a stream has **one active voice at a time** — playing again stops the previous voice. Routes through the manager's `music` bus by default (override via PlayOptions.bus).
Use Sound for short, frequently-triggered clips that benefit from pre-decoded `AudioBuffer` storage and pooled overlapping playback.

members.name: _createVoice
members.description: Implements Playable. Called by AudioManager.play. Stops any previously active voice (a stream has a single playhead), then starts a fresh AudioStreamVoice.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Stop the active voice and release the media graph.

members.name: loop
members.description: Default loop flag applied to new voices.

members.name: muted
members.description: Default muted flag (starts a voice at volume 0).

members.name: playbackRate
members.description: Default playback rate applied to new voices.

members.name: volume
members.description: Default volume applied to new voices. Range [0, 1].

members.name: duration
members.description: Total media duration in seconds (NaN until metadata has loaded).
